executives.name: Jason Simpson
executives.background: Mr. Simpson has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Orla, he was Chief Operating Officer of Torex Gold Resources Inc. and has held senior roles at G Mining Services and Vale.

board_of_directors.name: William Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in mineral exploration. He has been with Seabridge since 2000 and is responsible for the design and execution of the company's exploration programs.
